problem id: f4f27085
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10111101 -> 01101101
  11011110 -> 10100111
  01010100 -> 10100010
  00001110 -> 00011101
  11100101 -> 11010110
  10011110 -> 00101111
  11101011 -> 11001011
  11010001 -> 10111000

query: 11111101
predicted answer: 11100101
